commands.server-rules.accept.success: You have accepted the server rules. Welcome!
commands.server-rules.accept.already: You have already accepted the server rules.
commands.server-rules.decline.kick: You must accept the server rules to play on this server.
commands.server-rules.timeout.kick: You did not accept the server rules in time.
commands.server-rules.reload.all: Cleared all accepted players. Everyone must re-accept the rules.
commands.server-rules.reload.player: Removed acceptance for %s. They must accept the rules again.
commands.server-rules.restriction: You must accept the server rules before you can do this. Use /rules to view them.
